ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number for the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the transaction took place */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the invoice */,
  "invoice_year_month" TEXT /* Year and month of the invoice */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the transaction */,
  "min_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the first purchase by the customer */,
  "min_purchase_year_month" TEXT /* Year and month of the first purchase by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount including tax and discounts */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the customer is located */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined or first made a purchase */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* Calling code of the country */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol used in the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code (e.g., GB, US) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., width, height, depth) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the supplier is located */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's company website */,
  "primary_contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business the supplier is involved in (e.g., wholesale, manufacturing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific item in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the specific item in the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., ordered, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media, in-store) */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign (e.g., increase sales, brand awareness) */,
  "campaign_medium" TEXT /* Medium used for the campaign (e.g., email, SMS, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_customers" (
  "campaign_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-customer relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer in the campaign (e.g., subscribed, unsubscribed) */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions the customer had with the campaign */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_customers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_products" (
  "campaign_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-product relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product in the campaign (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Description of the offer for the product in the campaign */,
  "valid_from_date" TEXT /* Date from which the offer is valid */,
  "valid_to_date" TEXT /* Date until which the offer is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_products_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the purchase (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
